programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas deberán trabajar con un arquitecto para diseñar los espacios del restaurante para el desafío de la cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos concursantes se enfrentan en su última competencia de la cena final. El ganador asume el cargo de Chef en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert and his ten suitors set out for an active day at the beach and two lucky guys get chosen for the first solo dates with Robert. One suitor causes an uproar when he gets accused of behaving inappropriately in the house and word gets back to Robert.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Several suitors get to experience a sensual date with Robert, but a blissful night of romance and laughter ends horribly when one suitor loses his cool.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert gets a taste for the three suitors he has yet to connect with and has to decide which suitors are playing a game and which ones are playing for keeps.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The suitors unmask their true selves to Robert and what they reveal could change everything. One of the suitors struggles to balance his relationship with Robert and his friendships in the house.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The remaining guys are put to the test to see which of them truly knows Robert the best. Their patience is tested later when two suitors find themselves having to share Robert on a romantic date. A shocking elimination leaves the house rattled.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: A new group sit down to watch Episode 2 of Atlanta Season 1. They take a trip down memory lane as Stevie tries to make up with Mimi through song. Joseline accuses Karlie of being a snitch. Rasheeda & Kirk are reminded of the origins of "Marry Me".

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the cast settles in to watch Episode 3 of Season 1! Mimi claps back at Karlie for calling her a joke! Momma Dee apologizes to Erica for her behavior in the past and meddling in her relationship. Things go left when Stevie crosses Erica.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The cast runs it back, on Episode 4 of Atlanta Season 1. Scrappy finally has his own place. The group is sympathetic as they watch Joseline face a tough decision. Things get heated when the infamous parking lot brawl between Scrappy & Stevie takes place.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The OGs run it back on the iconic Episode 5. Mimi takes a big step in her relationship. Karlie tries to "Louis, Prada, Gucci" her way to the top. Scrappy's health scare leaves Momma Dee yelling at Erica! K. Michelle confronts Karlie & a table is shaken.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The OGs are forced to reconcile their past mistakes, as Episode 6 of Atlanta Season 1 plays. Fed up with Kirk's management, Rasheeda seeks advice from a competing manager. Joseline and Mimi sit down and address their latest issue.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: The OGs and fan favorites settle in to watch Episode 8. Erica receives some upsetting news from K. Michelle. An engagement ring catches Benzino's eye as things heat up between him & Karlie. Joseline joins Stevie & Mimi's therapy session with Dr. Jeff.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back
programme.desc: A new romance buds among the Run It Back cast as they watch Episode 9 of Atlanta Season 1. Erica confronts Scrappy about Shay. Momma Dee calls Erica a B-I-C-T-H... and in that order! Meanwhile Benzino and Karlie's romantic date takes a left turn.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta: Run It Back

programme.desc: Chrissy and Momma Jones plan a birthday party for Jim; Emily asks her client, NY Jets football star Darrell Revis, about his relationship with Olivia; Somaya's manager Maurice pushes her too far on a sexy photo shoot. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¿Seguirán juntos, Igor y Arantxa?, ¿Qué ocurrirá entre Jawy y Elettra?, y cómo será la última noche de los chicos en Madrid? Fiesta, amor, celos y lágrimas estarán presentes en el último capítulo de Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos ven por primera vez su verano y reaccionan aquellos momentos vividos tanto en Mykonos, Madrid y Barcelona

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los chicos de Súper Shore se reúnen para revivir y ver por primera vez los momentos más importantes del verano y lo que eso conlleva, descubrirán muchos hechos que quizá nos les haga mucha gracia

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras los chicos se encuentran en una fiesta, aparece sorpresivamente una amiga italiana de Abraham que provocará un gran conflicto de regreso a la casa. El verano Marbellí está que arde y el calor parece afectar las emociones de todos.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Igor y Talía cada vez se hace más intensa y amorosa y por supuesto esto a Arantxa no le cae nada bien y la pone en un lugar caliente, llevando la tensión a toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todos contra todos, Electra y Arantxa atacan a Igor, el brasileño ataca a Electra, la casa es un revuelo y encima llega visita que se pone demasiado pesada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La situación de Talía e Igor no estaría siendo la mejor. No hablar con Arantxa la lleva a quedar expuesta porque la española toma la iniciativa y le dice sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Kyle y Chloe de Geordie Shore llegan a Súper Shore y hacen historia al llegar a la casa de sorpresa para pasar unos días con los chicos. Los Ingleses muestran por qué son tan respetados y agarran fiesta muy duro.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.desc: In an attempt to sell her Del Mar listing, Tracy heads to the racetrack in search of wealthy buyers; Josh Altman faces wife Heather when trying to sell a problematic listing; Josh Flagg bakes up a plan to get back on James and David's good side.

programme.desc: Josh Altman goes full hipster in his last ditch effort to sell an architectural wonder in a trendy Venice neighborhood; Tracy takes over a stale listing in Brentwood and attempts to revive the grandeur of the historic Georgian estate.

programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday insists that the royal Hula Mouse must return to the Castle and asks Miss Paulificate to call "every person in the world." King Friday is flying around the world searching for the royal mouse.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches demonstrations of mechanical ball inventions. Prince Tuesday and Lady Aberlin are outside the castle playing with a unique toy. King Friday is unhappy about not finding Hula Mouse and breaks the toy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Not everyone in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe has recovered from the previous day's drama. King Friday tries to apologize. Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make bread.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.desc: An American diplomat is killed while being used as a pawn in a dangerous drug ring, and the team must work together to bring them down.

programme.desc: When a controversial senior leader from Egypt comes to New York for a heart transplant, OA struggles to balance his personal opinion with his professional duty when he is assigned to the security detail.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a decorated FBI agent is murdered, the team investigates and uncovers the man who led a double life.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A woman with information about the death of Maggie's husband is abducted leading the team to uncover a criminal operation larger than anyone imagined.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.desc: Don uses Charlie and Megan's expertise when the FBI is called to the scene of a federal judge's wife's murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team search for the stalker of a pop princess which turns into a murder investigation of a paparazzo.

programme.desc: Don and his team must solve the murder of a CFO of a large energy corporation who is found murdered on her doorstep and her young son is the only witness

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.desc: When a fellow FBI agent working undercover is killed in a gang retaliation, Don and his team must investigate.

programme.desc: When an ex-con who has recently been released from prison goes missing, the team questions whether her past mistakes, including embezzling money, may have come back to haunt her.

programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a retired soldier who returns to his hometown only to discover the place he grew up is now overrun with crime, drugs and violence. Enlisting the help of his old pal, Chris gets elected Sheriff and fights to clean up his hometown.

programme.title: Two for the Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.desc: A Vietnam War veteran, now a New York City postal worker, struggles with flashbacks and hallucinations. With the help of his new bride, he fights to keep sane while his brain fluctuates between reality and delusion.

programme.title: Hellraiser

programme.desc: Gordon visits Coeur D'Alene, Idaho, to try to rescue the failing Roosevelt Inn. Despite being over a million dollars in debt, the Roosevelt's owner, John Hough, is more interested in telling jokes than he is in fixing his struggling B&B.

programme.desc: Ash hears of a training ground for wild Charizard and decides it's just the place to hone his own Charizard’s strength. But the tough lessons to be learned there will change Ash and Charizard’s friendship forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road to the Azalea Gym, our heroes discover a Sunflora festival in a nearby town and meet a Trainer whose Sunflora is too sad to compete. Can Ash and the gang put a smile on its face?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash is having a hard time getting his Chikorita to listen to him, and Nurse Joy thinks that it’s due to a bout of jealousy over Ash’s friendship with Pikachu! Can Ash prove how much Chikorita means to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Hoppip partners can predict the weather. But on the horizon, there are two storms approaching...and one of them goes by the name 'Team Rocket'!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Superhero Secret
programme.desc: The legendary superhero Gligarman grows old and is beginning to consider hanging up his cape. When Ash and friends wander into town, they bring with them a challenge that could be his final fight: Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Mild ‘N Wooly
programme.desc: When an unruly herd of Mareep ruin their lunch plans, our heroes decide to help their timid herder in time to compete in a local battle festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Wired For Battle
programme.desc: When the top student at a Pokémon training center loses interest in Pokémon battles, opting to build a comprehensive Pokémon database instead, it’s up to Ash to convince him that battling is not just about probability!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Good ‘Quil Hunting
programme.desc: When Ash finds a Cyndaquil in the wild, he is eager to catch it...but you can bet he’s not the only one!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Shadow Of A Drought
programme.desc: Arriving in Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents, who adore SlowPoké. And things only look worse as Team Rocket arrives, meaning to snag every last SlowPoké! What can Ash do?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Going Apricorn
programme.desc: As he promised Professor Oak, Ash delivers the mysterious GS Ball to a renowned Poké Ball expert. But the fruits of his labor are almost spoiled when Team Rocket bursts onto the scene!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Gettin’ The Bugs Out
programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Farfetch’d Tale
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tricks Of The Trade
programme.desc: At an annual Pokémon trading festival, a young Trainer is looking for a good trade for his Wobbuffet. The Team Rocket trio are looking for opportunities as well, but both sets of Trainers get more than they bargain for!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fire-Ing Squad!
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: No Big Woop!
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: On the way to Goldenrod City, our heroes are forced to head through a tunnel guarded by angry Onix. To make it more difficult, Team Rocket, Snubbull, and Jigglypuff drop in for a visit…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hour Of Houndour
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Totodile Duel
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hot Matches
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Love, Totodile Style
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Forrest Grumps
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Psychic Sidekicks
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fortune Hunters
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.desc: A 5-year-old is hit by a school bus. A model volcano suddenly explodes engulfing a youngster in flames.

programme.title: Rescue 911
programme.desc: A man is injured while trying to move a bail of hay with his tractor. A babysitter call 911 when the 4-year-old starts choking.

programme.title: Rescue 911
programme.desc: A child playing on a moving escalator gets his clothes caught in the steps. A teen loses grip hanging from the ledge of a rock face and falls 80 feet to the water's edge.

programme.title: Rescue 911
programme.desc: A man driving his car loses control and crashes. An armed man takes his girlfriend hostage.

programme.title: Rescue 911
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is trapped in a pool drain. News footage shows firefighters saving people trapped in an office building fire.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: Peridot
programme.desc: The story of Gabriel, a young male prostitute who forms the most unlikely friendship with Martha, a world renowned author.

programme.title: T11 Incomplete
programme.desc: Past mistakes haunt the present and threaten a new love affair between a troubled home health aide and her new patient.

programme.title: The Feels
programme.desc: Andi and Lu are excited to celebrate their upcoming wedding with a joint bachelorette weekend in wine country. On the first night, things get off to a rocky start when one of the brides admits that she's never had an orgasm.

programme.title: The Walk-In Closet
programme.desc: Roommates Billie, a mediocre-at-best lesbian stand-up comic, and Sterling, a gay ballet dancer with some talent, decide to get married to save Sterling's Canadian residency.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: I Do
programme.desc: A gay Briton living in New York risks losing his family and residency in the United States. He marries a lesbian friend to remain in the country, but things get complicated when he meets the love of his life.

programme.title: He's Way More Famous Than You
programme.desc: When once-promising actress Halley Feiffer (Halley Feiffer) loses her boyfriend, agent and career all at once, she decides that the only way to change her fortune is to make her own movie.

programme.title: Braking for Whales
programme.desc: A dysfunctional brother and sister are forced to come to terms with each other and themselves over their recently deceased mother's final wish.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Sure, sure, we know what you're thinking. Laser Mission? What kind of a thing is that to make a movie about? Everybody's been on a laser mission. Just trust us when we tell you, this one is special.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Superheroes!
programme.desc: Welcome to RiffTrax Shorts: Superheroes, three short films that teach us it takes more than tights and a cape to be a superhero. Sometimes, it takes a Mylar jumpsuit and a garbage can lid. Featuring Batman, Measuring Man, and Safety Woman!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Miami Connection
programme.desc: If you put everything about the 80s in a blender, then somehow ran that through a translator that only speaks languages from another dimension, what you'd wind up with still wouldn't be half as hilarious, weird, and oddly charming as Miami Connection.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Yesterday's Target
programme.desc: Way back in 1996, the stars aligned and gave us Yesterday's Target, a TV movie starring LeVar Burton, Malcolm McDowell, and a Baldwin brother! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zindy The Swamp Boy
programme.desc: Riding the end of the great Swamp Boy movie craze of the early 70s, Zindy the Swamp Boy effectively ended the genre. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie I Eat Your Skin
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Featuring one of the most bizarre, but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on `Robot Wars', Gabriel, built by Mensa member Craig and his three sons. It has wheels as tall as a washing machine and a huge samurai sword.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Firestorm makes a long-awaited comeback in a battle against Daisy-Cutter, Black and Blue, and Bamm Bamm. Heat P determines the robots who will make it to the semi-finals of the seventh series.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight competitors compete for a spot in the next semi-final round as half are eliminated. Round 1 sees Tornado employ the use of a spinner drum to flip its opponent.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the eliminating rounds, Tornado takes on Storm 2, and X-Terminator challenges Typhoon 2, in a fierce attack that takes out the disc weapon of Typhoon 2.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots fight until one is taken down. The remaining fighters regroup and continue until only one remains. Round one begins in a merciless fashion as Ripper flips Robochicken.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Alcides se lleva a Soledad bajo amenaza y envía un mensaje a su hermano con los Burke. En la mina Alcides retiene a Soledad a la fuerza y le cuenta toda la verdad sobre la muerte de Hugo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: El doctor Max hipnotiza a Soledad para borrar sus recuerdos, por lo que ella piensa que es solo Alcides quien muere en la explosión. Boris trata de rescatarlos por los alrededores de la mina.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Boris y Marina rescatan solo a uno de los hermanos y lo llevan a la hacienda Montenegro. Soledad corre peligro cuando llega Arturo y le cobra el dinero que Alcides le debe.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Arturo es detenido por agredir a Soledad. Ella se entera que el juez aprueba la exhumación del cuerpo de Hugo tras la insistencia de Paquito, quien quiere confirmar sus sospechas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela grita para que Raquel la escuche y la ayude, la amiga va al sótano y la ve amordazada, al no poderla liberar huye y tiene un accidente fatal. Se cumple otro sueño premonitorio de Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En medio del funeral, Benito arma un escándalo, le reclama a Ruth por dejar sola a Raquel y le dice que ella no tiene derecho a disponer de la fortuna. Ruth presenta a su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dan lectura al testamento de Raquel, la sorpresa es general cuando nombran heredera universal a Eva. Don Martín tiene planes de escapar del hospital psiquiátrico, busca ayuda para salir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora siente que el tiempo se le agota, piensa en matar a Gabriela si no firma los poderes. Una enfermera ficticia toma la silla de ruedas de Martín y lo ayuda a fugarse del psiquiátrico.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín y Hortencia logran escapar del sanatorio, Bustillo ordena a los guardias que los busquen, pero no los hallan. Gabriela está arrepentida por no escuchar las advertencias de sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando enfurece al no encontrar las joyas que Gabriela tiene guardadas, se pone a la defensiva cuando Norma llega con Eva a revisar la casa. Dínora amenaza a Gabriela para que no grite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop in Stechelberg in the Burmese Alps and receive a clue instructing them to fly to Munich, Germany and then drive to Ruhpolding, where they will ride a cable car to the top of the mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from the Pit Stop at the Schloss Hellbrunn in Salzburg, Austria and receive a clue instructing them to travel by train to Munich and then fly 700 miles to Bucharest, Romania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams set off from the Vila Panoramic and receive a clue instructing them to fly through Moscow to Krasnoyarsk, Siberia and then travel to the hydroelectric dam depicted on the back of Russia's ten ruble note.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Having shaken off the shock of the fourth elimination, the seven remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Theater of Musical Comedy in Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, Russia, and receive a clue instructing them to ride the Trans-Siberian Railway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams depart from their Pit Stop at the Siberian Colosseum, leaving the cold of Siberia and flying nearly 2,000 miles to the heat of Jaipur, India.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams set off from the Jaigur Fort in Jaipur, India and receive a clue instructing them to fly nearly 2,000 miles to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining five teams take off from their Pit Stop at the Wat Thep Nimit Temple in Phuket, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to fly over 400 miles to Bangkok, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams set off from the eighth Pit Stop at a royal palace in Bangkok, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to travel over 1,000 miles to Guilin, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams set off from their Pit Stop at the park of the Sun and Moon Pagodas in Guilin, China and receive a clue instructing them to fly north, over 1,000 miles, to Beijing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining four teams learn that the destination that they have reached is not a Pit Stop and they are still racing. They search the area shops of a Bei Hei streets for a Travelocity roaming gnome, which they must keep until the leg's Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the fourteenth season's finale, the final three teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Bird's Nest Stadium in Beijing, China and travel over 5,000 miles to Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Twelve Teams stand at the start line in Los Angeles, Calif., but only 11 will make the journey to Tokyo, Japan as the Racers are faced with a heart-breaking surprise elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle to combat the hectic pace of Vietnam and one Team puts their own Race in jeopardy by offering to help the competition.

programme.desc: Reddick, Boseman and Lockhart represent a young woman who was assaulted while a contestant on the reality dating show "Chicago Penthouse." Diane fears she might be the next "Kill All Lawyers" target. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Liz decides to represent her son's favorite teacher after she senses the school fired him for illegitimate reasons. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Adrian and Diane serve as outside counsel for a broadcast network planning to air a controversial segment that would derail the career of a beloved star. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Adrian becomes an overnight celebrity after his candid appearance on a cable news show goes viral. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and Will go to trial unprepared when they learn that an impending Supreme Court ruling could result in Colin Sweeney being jailed for life. Also, Diane reunites with Kurt McVeigh but is forced to reevaluate the relationship.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia represents a girl who accuses a classmate of rape, the case takes on a life of its own when the hacker group "Anonymous" takes notice and brings the trial into the public eye via the Internet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes of the International Anti-Poaching Foundation to see how they are bringing paramilitary techniques to the front lines of conservation in a fight to protect Africa's rhinos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the Sao Paulo Zoo, where a small cat-breeding program aims to save many of Brazil's endangered wildcats including the Margay, Oncilla and Pampas Cat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon's pristine habitats are prime for primates! Come along as Jungle Jack meets up with conservationists to learn about the future of primates big and small, including Chimpanzees, Gorillas, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Reptile Round-Up
programme.desc: Some slither, others climb and a few pack a heck of a punch… today, it’s the reptiles! Join Jack and the king cobra, snaconda, tortoise, chameleon and more cold-blooded creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: While in Barro Colorado, a dense forested island in Panama, Jack goes in search of a Harpy the world's largest eagle. The island is home to the famed Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out why all of the animals on today’s countdown are showing off their pearly whites. From the hippos' mega-chompers to snakes with fangs that inject toxic venom, and piranhas, crocs, African elephants and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Just Beachy
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s countdown love the beach just as much as Jungle Jack! Come along for a coastal adventure with African penguins, sea lions, marine iguanas, elephant seals and sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a rescue mission and meet the charismatic animals that were spared from the brink. Dolphins, Dogs, Asian Elephants, Horses, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey into the Danger Zone. He’s coming face-to-face with a deadly bushmaster, visiting mountain lions in close quarters, crossing paths with a grumpy elephant, climbing into a cave filled with bats, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to South Africa to explore one of the most ground-breaking reserves on the continent – Shamwari. What once was old farming land, is now a meticulously restored eco-system brimming with wildlife and adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Monkey Business
programme.desc: Get ready for some monkey business! From proboscis monkeys, to howlers, baboons and macaques, Jack is counting down some of his favorite primates all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Cats
programme.desc: From breathtaking tigers to elusive ocelots, lightning-fast cheetahs, leaping leopards, and the rarest lions on Earth. Join Jack Hanna for this Wild Countdown featuring 10 unforgettable encounters with nature’s top cats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his wife Sue are in Montana meeting up with some amazing people who are taking animal rescue to whole new level! First, a couple that left big city life to run a ranch dedicated to animals in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle as he saddles up for six amazing ranching adventures! From working a dude ranch in Canada to herding sheep with Patagonian gauchos, and cattle ranching in Montana, Jack is living the ultimate cowboy life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wildlife Crime-Fighters
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the frontlines witnessing conservation and anti-poaching efforts in action around the world all to help save threatened and endangered species. Rhinos, elephants, primates and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack journeys to Nairobi where he and Sue learn to care for baby elephant orphans at a truly groundbreaking animal nursery. Then they come face to face with some of the country's tallest citizens – the endangered Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camped Out
programme.desc: Usually, Jack has to go out looking for wild animals. In this episode see what happens when he spends the night in their world! Hippos, bears, lions and elephants are just a few of the animals Jack encounters in his campy countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Some animals have been using social networks for eons, like herds of elephants, colonies of ants and bees, hyena clans and even chimpanzees. Today, Jungle Jack will see what it takes to get “likes” from these special species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue are headed to Paso Robles, California to go behind the scenes at the "Zoo to You" ranch, where rescued wildlife become animal ambassadors. They get up close and personal with a Bear, Bengal Tiger, Camel, Peregrine Falcon, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Does having a big brain mean you’re the smartest? Find out on today’s countdown as Jungle Jack meets the biggest brainiacs of the animal kingdom, like dolphins, elephants, dogs, sperm whales, chimpanzees and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In 1990, Mary Bradford of Kannapolis, North Carolina took one parrot into her house in need of care, now her commitment has grown to more than 275 birds. Mary's unique care center is believed to be the only retirement home of its kind for exotic birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.
